title: Summary: Turn 1048
content: User requested plan review. Assistant provided structured overview of KnowledgeBase project: LLM-based knowledge graph tool with 4-step pipeline (extraction, concept building, relation inference, visualization), 8 optimization directions, completed Day1 (Notion category, references, LLM services) and Day2 (Obsidian export, CLI framework, service layer), pending tasks (caching, CRUD, search, logging, etc.).
